flags.label: Barclay College · Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Barclay College are 30% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($36.4k vs $52.3k).

flags.label: Central Christian College of Kansas · Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Central Christian College of Kansas are 15% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($44.5k vs $52.3k).

flags.label: Sterling College · Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Sterling College are 12% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($45.8k vs $52.3k).

flags.label: Barclay College · Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.9% at Barclay College exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($24.3k debt amortized over 10 years vs $36.4k earnings).

flags.label: Barclay College · 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Barclay College fell 90% between 2021 and 2024 (33.3% → 3.2%).

flags.label: Kansas Christian College · 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kansas Christian College fell 80% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 9.8%).

flags.label: Neosho County Community College · 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Neosho County Community College fell 70% between 2006 and 2009 (21.1% → 6.2%).

flags.label: Allen County Community College · Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Allen County Community College rose 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $4.9k).
